query: Hades II new Hidden Aspects Nocturnal Arms names Vow of Rivals Oath of the Unseen effects

mako.raw:
{"query":"Hades II new Hidden Aspects Nocturnal Arms names Vow of Rivals Oath of the Unseen effects","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1450,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://hades.fandom.com/wiki/The_Unseen_Update","title":"The Unseen Update - Hades Wiki","content":"This article contains detailed information about Hades or Hades II that may spoil your enjoyment of discovering the game's secrets for yourself.
Hidden Aspects: Each of the Nocturnal Arms now has a secret, final form to discover...
Rewards you for waking Hypnos, though this cannot be done just yet..."},{"url":"https://in.ign.com/hades-ii/234325/news/hades-2-the-unseen-update-expands-the-game-with-new-weapon-forms-vow-of-rivals-stronger-guardians-an","title":"Hades 2: ‘The Unseen Update’ Expands the Game With New Weapon Forms, ‘Vow of Rivals’, Stronger Guardians, and More","content":"The game is now entering its final development stage, with the studio working to add the true story ending.
Hades 2 has received its biggest patch yet in early access, with major updates that include new hidden aspects for all Nocturnal Arms, visual improvements, expanded character relationships, and gameplay tweaks.
Hades 2 is also going to be a timed console exclusive on Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2."},{"url":"https://hades2.wiki.fextralife.com/Weapon+Aspects","title":"All Weapon Aspects Complete Guide | Hades 2 Wiki","content":"5 days ago — Every weapon has three standard Aspects and one hidden Aspect, each offering distinct advantages, buffs, and playstyle variations. Some provide ...Read more
Weapon Aspects Hades 2 Wiki in Hades 2 grant unique abilities and permanent enhancements that fundamentally reshape how each Weapon functions in battle.
Weapon aspects are different forms that Melinoe can unlock for her six Nocturnal Arms.
From unlocking hidden powers to customizing movesets, they ensure that every run in Hades II can feel fresh, strategic, and tailored to the player’s preferred combat style.
Weapon Aspects are managed at the Silver Pool.
These elusive upgrades won’t appear in the Silver Pool until you’ve met several key conditions.
First, make sure you have all six Nocturnal Arms unlocked and fully acquired."},{"url":"https://www.dualshockers.com/hades-2-update-adds-secret-form-nocturnal-arms/","title":"Hades 2 Update Adds Secret Form To All Nocturnal Arms As It Approaches 1.0 Release","content":"A year after Hades 2 entered early access, developer Supergiant Games is bringing a new update to the game's Early Access build.
This isn't just any update, though.
"We're heading into the final phase of Hades 2 development, which involves adding the story's true ending and other finishing touches." While a release date is not available for 1.0 just yet, we do have a brand new patch available, titled The Unseen Update.
There are also all new changes from each Guardian in the Oath of the Unseen, new music and artwork on character portraits, and more.
Following The Unseen Update, Supergiant says that they're looking to focus on the following major initiatives as they head towards the 1.0 launch:
Finishing Touches: We're continuing to polish and refine all the content we've introduced in Hades II, from Boons and powers to artwork and story events.
"The Hades series is setting the tone as one of the premier indie rogue-like series in modern gaming history," we said in our impressions."},{"url":"https://www.thegamer.com/hades-2-all-hidden-weapon-aspect-unlock-guide/","title":"All Hidden Weapon Aspects And What They Do In Hades 2","content":"The newest of these aspects are hidden gems that change how the weapons themselves operate.
All other aspects of the weapon have to be unlocked.
Thankfully, you have time because all hidden aspects require Nightmares to upgrade (usually two Nightmares per level)."}]}
